mapper.select: SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id , CTTST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , CTTST.sub_type_name , CTTST.select_a_count , CTTST.select_a_memo , CTTST.select_b_count , CTTST.select_b_memo , CTTST.select_c_count , CTTST.select_c_memo , CTTST.select_d_count , CTTST.select_d_memo , CTTST.select_e_count , CTTST.select_e_memo , CTTST.select_f_count , CTTST.select_f_memo , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_code , H.hospital_name , CTR.center_id , CTR.center_code , CTR.center_name FROM center CTR JOIN checkup_contract CTT ON CTT.center_id = CTR.center_id JOIN hospital H ON CTR.hospital_id = H.hospital_id JOIN checkup_contract_type CTTT ON CTT.checkup_contract_id = CTTT.checkup_contract_id JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CTTT.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id AND CCT.company_checkup_type_id = #{companyCheckupTypeId} JOIN company_checkup CC ON CCT.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id JOIN company C ON CC.company_id = C.company_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CTTST ON CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id = CTTST.checkup_contract_type_id AND CTTST.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE CCT.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CTR.deleted_at IS NULL AND H.deleted_at IS NULL AND CTR.center_id = #{centerId}

SELECT item_class_id AS id , item_class_id AS key_id , NULL AS parent_id , NULL AS key_parent_id , 'class' AS item_type , item_class_code AS code , item_class_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_class WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_category_id AS id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_id , item_class_id AS parent_id , item_class_id AS key_parent_id , 'category' AS item_type , item_category_code AS code , item_category_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL
SELECT I.item_id AS id , I.item_id + 1000000 AS key_id , I.item_category_id AS parent_id , I.item_category_id + 10000 AS key_parent_id , 'item' AS item_type , I.item_code AS code , I.item_name AS name , HC.hospital_checkup_id AS hospital_checkup_id , HC.hospital_id AS hospital_id , HC.checkup_year AS checkup_year , HC.bill AS bill , CTTI.checkup_contract_item_id AS checkup_contract_item_id , CTTI.checkup_contract_sub_type_id AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , IFNULL(CTTI.register, 0) AS register , CTTI.copay AS copay , CTTI.discount_bill AS discount_bill FROM item I LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup HC ON I.item_id = HC.item_id AND HC.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND HC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_item CTTI ON I.item_id = CTTI.item_id AND CTTI.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = #{checkupContractSubTypeId}
